mapper.sql: s.rprt_yr, s.oprtr_id, s.ttl_co2_emsn, s.ttl_ofst_req, s.ttl_cef_redu, s.ttl_flt_cnt, s.ttl_fuel_wght, s.ttl_saf_qty, s.data_gap_cnt, s.last_aggr_dt
s.rprt_yr, s.oprtr_id, o.oprtr_nm, o.icao_desig, s.ttl_co2_emsn, s.ttl_ofst_req, s.ttl_cef_redu, s.ttl_flt_cnt, s.ttl_fuel_wght, s.ttl_saf_qty, s.data_gap_cnt, s.last_aggr_dt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ptl.tn_ptl_stat_yearly s JOIN com.tn_oprtr o ON o.oprtr_id = s.oprtr_id AND o.use_end_dt > NOW() WHERE s.rprt_yr = #{rprtYr} ORDER BY o.icao_desig
SELECT FROM ptl.tn_ptl_stat_yearly s WHERE s.oprtr_id = #{oprtrId} ORDER BY s.rprt_yr DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ptl.tn_ptl_stat_yearly ( rprt_yr, oprtr_id, ttl_co2_emsn, ttl_ofst_req, ttl_cef_redu, ttl_flt_cnt, ttl_fuel_wght, ttl_saf_qty, data_gap_cnt, last_aggr_dt ) VALUES ( #{rprtYr}, #{oprtrId}, #{ttlCo2Emsn}, #{ttlOfstReq}, #{ttlCefRedu}, #{ttlFltCnt}, #{ttlFuelWght}, #{ttlSafQty}, #{dataGapCnt}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (rprt_yr, oprtr_id) DO UPDATE SET ttl_co2_emsn = EXCLUDED.ttl_co2_emsn, ttl_ofst_req = EXCLUDED.ttl_ofst_req, ttl_cef_redu = EXCLUDED.ttl_cef_redu, ttl_flt_cnt = EXCLUDED.ttl_flt_cnt, ttl_fuel_wght = EXCLUDED.ttl_fuel_wght, ttl_saf_qty = EXCLUDED.ttl_saf_qty, data_gap_cnt = EXCLUDED.data_gap_cnt, last_aggr_dt = NOW()
